item.title: Mike Vrabel, Dianna Russini Photog NOT Private Eye Hired By Suspecting Spouse
item.description: The photographer who snapped the pics of Mike Vrabel and Dianna Russini lookin' all cozy in Arizona was NOT a private investigator hired by a scorned ...

item.title: Cher's Conservatorship Request for Son Elijah Blue Allman Denied by Judge
item.description: Cher's latest attempt to put her son Elijah Blue Allman under a temporary conservatorship just hit a wall ... a judge down the request -- with Elijah ...

item.title: FBI Director Kash Patel Previously Admitted to 2 Alcohol-Related Arrests
item.description: FBI Director Kash Patel is suing over claims he's been drunk on the job ... but he reportedly admitted in the past to twice being arrested for alcohol...

item.title: Cher's Son Elijah Blue Allman Entering Treatment Facility as He Fights Mom in Court
item.description: Cher's troubled son Elijah Blue Allman will be checking into a residential treatment facility -- following his recent arrests -- as he fights his lege...

item.title: Knife Fight Erupts After Dog Pees on Neighbor's Lawn, 3 Injured
item.description: Crazy domino effect after a dog peed on a neighbor's lawn ... two men came out of the home and urinated in retaliation ... then a knife fight broke ou...
